name: The Midnight Cipher
short_plot_summary: A brilliant linguist discovers an ancient code hidden within radio waves from a dying star, leading to a race against a shadow organization.

name: Monsoon Lanterns
short_plot_summary: Two childhood friends reunite in Mumbai during the monsoon and confront family secrets that will change their lives.

name: Steel Horizon
short_plot_summary: In a near-future megacity, an ex-cop and an outlaw pilot team up to stop a corporate weaponized AI.

name: Paper Tigers
short_plot_summary: A struggling theatre troupe stages an ambitious musical to save their legacy and discovers unexpected talent.

name: Bluefin Run
short_plot_summary: An aging sailor and a young marine biologist chase a legend of a rare bluefin through stormy seas.

name: Pixel Pilgrims
short_plot_summary: Two digital sprites leave their arcade to rescue a lost player's memory across retro game worlds.

name: Echoes of the Bazaar
short_plot_summary: A jewellery designer deciphers coded messages hidden in antique fabrics while evading a criminal syndicate.

name: Neon Pilgrim
short_plot_summary: A courier with a haunted past delivers memories across a neon-soaked metropolis and must choose which to keep.

name: The Last Carousel
short_plot_summary: An old fairground's wooden animals come to life one final night to teach a lonely child about courage.

name: Crimson Ledger
short_plot_summary: A forensic accountant uncovers a money trail that ties a beloved philanthropist to organized crime.

name: Ganges of Gold
short_plot_summary: During the late 1800s, a fisherman's family is pulled into a freedom movement and a costly trade dispute.

name: Orbit Motel
short_plot_summary: Strangers stuck overnight at a remote roadside motel discover their lives are oddly connected.

name: Shadow Cartographer
short_plot_summary: A mapmaker finds a map that changes each night and leads to a vanished town's dark history.

name: Saffron Sunrise
short_plot_summary: Two rival chefs in Delhi fall in love while competing in a national culinary contest.

name: Glass Canyon
short_plot_summary: A retired bounty hunter must return to the canyon to protect a town from a violent gang.

name: Marigold Mechanics
short_plot_summary: A group of female mechanics start a mobile repair shop that transforms attitudes in a small town.

name: Ink & Ember
short_plot_summary: A runaway apprentice binds a living storybook to fight an encroaching grayness stealing color from the world.

name: Quantum Cats
short_plot_summary: A team of curious kittens accidentally split time and must herd fractured realities back together.

name: Midnight Masala
short_plot_summary: A late-night radio host and a struggling singer create an underground musical movement across Mumbai.

name: Silent Alloy
short_plot_summary: When robotic statues begin whispering, a linguist and a sculptor decode messages from a lost civilization.

name: Paper Planes Over Karachi
short_plot_summary: Two siblings strive to keep their neighborhood library open despite political pressure and dwindling funds.

name: River of Echoes
short_plot_summary: A lyrical portrait of river ecosystems and the communities whose lives are woven with the water.

name: Clockwork Dervish
short_plot_summary: An inventor and a dancer unlock a hidden city within a clocktower and confront a forgotten dynasty.

name: Neptune's Choir
short_plot_summary: A young marine discovers singing whales that guide lost sailors and uncover a centuries-old pact.

name: Velvet Revolver
short_plot_summary: A retired thief is pulled back into one last heist that tests loyalties and old alliances.

name: Kite Strings
short_plot_summary: A child seeks to reunite his divorced parents by entering a traditional kite festival.

name: Hologram Heart
short_plot_summary: A holographic companion and her creator fall into a forbidden connection that questions what it means to love.

name: The Last Papier
short_plot_summary: Paper figures in a stationery shop band together to save their maker from closing the store.

name: Bombay Bullet
short_plot_summary: An honest traffic cop uncovers a smuggling ring that uses the city's busy streets to hide their tracks.

name: Solar Bloom
short_plot_summary: On a space farm orbiting a dim star, a botanist engineers a plant that could restore light to dying worlds.

name: Tamasha Tides
short_plot_summary: A seaside theatre troupe stages a bold play that mirrors the real romantic choices facing its actors.

name: Broken Lighthouse
short_plot_summary: A lighthouse keeper's memories fracture as an investigation into a missing boat reveals deeper truths.

name: Lantern Road
short_plot_summary: An aging bus conductor and a young volunteer challenge societal expectations on a soul-searching pilgrimage.

name: Golem Arcade
short_plot_summary: Kids assemble broken arcade cabinets and awaken a friendly golem that helps them save their neighborhood.

name: Opal Network
short_plot_summary: A journalist traces a whisper network of hacked memories that reveals a political cover-up.

name: Paan & Roses
short_plot_summary: An arranged marriage turns into a playful battle of wits when the couple open a café together.

name: Atlas of Small Things
short_plot_summary: A curator assembles a museum exhibit of everyday objects that reveals hidden lives of ordinary people.

name: Cradle of Rockets
short_plot_summary: A young engineer in Pune builds model rockets that attract the attention of a space start-up with secrets.

name: Wander & Stitch
short_plot_summary: A traveling tailor and a stray dog mend more than clothes as they help townspeople reconnect.

name: Mercury Casino
short_plot_summary: A washed-up gambler plots to take down the casino syndicate that controls his city.

name: Lotus & Lead
short_plot_summary: During a period of political unrest, a female journalist risks everything to report the truth.

name: Neon Origami
short_plot_summary: Paper creatures in a neon city learn to fold their way through memories and become guardians of forgotten joys.

name: Sidecar Serenade
short_plot_summary: An unlikely duo ride across Latin America on a vintage scooter to deliver a long-lost mixtape.

name: The Ashoka Cipher
short_plot_summary: An archaeologist decodes an inscription that points to a hidden chamber and ancient political intrigue.

name: Shadow Puppets
short_plot_summary: Traditional puppets teach a skeptical child about ancestry when their village faces erasure by developers.

name: Glass & Grease
short_plot_summary: Portraits of artisans who keep dying crafts alive in the face of mass production.

name: Rogue Basilica
short_plot_summary: A priest and an architect unearth a hidden crypt whose presence awakens the building's violent past.

name: Rice & Revolutions
short_plot_summary: Farmers unite against corporate policies in a rural district, sparking a movement that reaches the capital.

name: Aurora Freight
short_plot_summary: A freighter captain takes a dangerous route through cosmic storms to deliver lifesaving cargo to a colony.

name: Paper Moon Puppetry
short_plot_summary: Children craft paper moons to cheer a grieving town and inadvertently bring the sky a little closer.

name: Silent Ledger
short_plot_summary: An investigator follows a dead accountant's ledger into a maze of offshore shells and deadly cover-ups.

name: Kites of Kandahar
short_plot_summary: Amid conflict, a girl uses kite festivals to send messages and keep hope alive between divided families.

name: Velvet Circuit
short_plot_summary: When neural implants start dreaming, an engineer must trace the dream-code to its creator.

name: The Great Mango Heist
short_plot_summary: A small-town gang plots to steal a legendary mango shipment to save their orphanage's funding.

name: Lanterns of Lhasa
short_plot_summary: A pilgrim and a photographer traverse high plateaus to restore a stolen sacred lamp.

name: Midwest Midnight
short_plot_summary: A gas-station attendant in a snowbound town encounters an entity that feeds on regret.

name: Sitar & Steel
short_plot_summary: A classical sitarist and a rock guitarist collaborate on an album that bridges generational divides.

name: Cloudsmith
short_plot_summary: Sky-farmers shape clouds into music; a young smith discovers a note that can heal storms.

name: The Locksmith's Daughter
short_plot_summary: A locksmith's daughter uses her skills to help neighbors and stumbles into a burglary ring's secrets.

name: Orbit & Oboe
short_plot_summary: An astronaut on leave reconnects with a childhood friend and forms an unlikely chamber group.

name: Neela's Train
short_plot_summary: A widowed tea-seller risks everything to board a train and find her estranged son in the city.

name: Frostline
short_plot_summary: An arctic research team races to stop a pathogen thawed from ancient ice before it spreads.

name: The Glass Sparrow
short_plot_summary: A glassblower uncovers clues in fragile sculptures that lead to a missing painter's trail.

name: Midnight Wadi
short_plot_summary: A young lawyer in a desert city defends a community accused of a crime they did not commit.

name: Paper Lantern Soldiers
short_plot_summary: During a resistance movement, ordinary villagers become unlikely heroes guided by symbolic lanterns.

name: Tiny Atlas
short_plot_summary: Miniature explorers map backyard continents and rescue a lost insect kingdom from a flood.

name: Echo Harbor
short_plot_summary: A lighthouse keeper and a marine biologist rebuild trust while uncovering a harbor's buried artifacts.

name: Rubicon Blues
short_plot_summary: A jazz singer becomes entangled with a city's underworld while chasing a second chance in music.

name: Stellar Stitch
short_plot_summary: A seamstress robot sews constellations back into a damaged sky to reunite scattered stardust.

name: Concrete Petals
short_plot_summary: A community garden blossoms in the middle of a housing project, changing neighbors' lives.

name: Dabba Diaries
short_plot_summary: A lunchbox deliveryman's daily routes connect him with stories that teach him his own worth.

name: Iron & Ink
short_plot_summary: A metalworker discovers that forged swords carry memories and must return them to their rightful owners.

name: Cinema Under the Banyan
short_plot_summary: A traveling cinema screens films to villages while its projectionist struggles to keep tradition alive.

name: Hyperlane Hitchhike
short_plot_summary: A mismatched duo hitch rides between hyperlanes and stumble into cosmic bureaucracy and laughter.

name: Mango Tango
short_plot_summary: Two rival fruit vendors fall for each other amid a chaotic summer festival.

name: Glasswing
short_plot_summary: A beetle with glass-like wings embarks on a journey to restore color to a graying forest.

name: The Quiet Major
short_plot_summary: A low-ranking officer's small act of compassion alters the course of a wartime village's survival.

name: Bolero Bazaar
short_plot_summary: A street musician's composition travels across stalls and becomes an anthem of resilience.

name: Sundown Cartridge
short_plot_summary: A courier with a dangerous package must outwit mercenaries across desert highways.

name: Saffron & Salt
short_plot_summary: A recipe book helps two estranged families rekindle traditions and mend long-standing rifts.

name: Voyage of the Paper Boat
short_plot_summary: Children send paper boats down a river which carry their wishes and lead to unexpected adventures.

name: Hollow Crown
short_plot_summary: An idealistic advisor navigates palace intrigues while trying to reform a failing institution.

name: Bollywood Beats
short_plot_summary: An exploration of India’s regional music scenes and the artists keeping tradition alive.

name: Sundial Run
short_plot_summary: Thieves race against an eclipse to steal a device that can freeze time in small zones.

name: Curry & Cadence
short_plot_summary: A classical dancer and a pop composer find harmony while preparing a cross-genre show.

name: Mariner's Map
short_plot_summary: An old nautical chart and a missing captain lead a young cartographer to an untouched island.

name: Tiny Thunder
short_plot_summary: A storm sprite teams up with a shy cloud to bring summer rain to a drought-stricken valley.

name: The Last Matchbox
short_plot_summary: An impoverished match-seller's small acts of kindness ripple through a bustling city street.

name: Crystal Harbor
short_plot_summary: Two estranged lovers reunite in a seaside town to confront compromises made long ago.

name: Bolt & Blossom
short_plot_summary: A lost robot and a gardening girl repair a broken greenhouse and learn about growth and friendship.

name: The Copper Pilgrim
short_plot_summary: A traveling tinsmith becomes an unlikely chronicler of a village’s transformation across decades.

name: Neela Nazar
short_plot_summary: A photojournalist's snapshots reveal a recurring face tied to a string of unsolved thefts.

name: Circuit Garden
short_plot_summary: Children plant a robotic garden that grows playful machines which teach them engineering and empathy.

name: The Lantern Thief
short_plot_summary: A tiny thief steals glowing lanterns that carry memories, and a brave girl returns them to their owners.

name: Cobra & Coconut
short_plot_summary: An ex-stuntman and a coconut vendor team up to expose a fake miracle cult in Goa.

name: Paper Comet
short_plot_summary: A paper comet travels through a child's drawings bringing their small wishes to life.

name: Riverside Radio
short_plot_summary: A decrepit radio station revives with grassroots voices and becomes a town's heartbeat.

name: The Iron Swimmer
short_plot_summary: A salvage diver races underwater currents to recover a prototype engine before privateers do.

name: Sundial Sisters
short_plot_summary: Three sisters restore their ancestral home and uncover stories that bind them stronger than grief.

name: Aurora Kite
short_plot_summary: A child builds a kite that flies into the aurora and returns with pieces of the night sky to heal a sleeping town.
